name: AI discovery — llms.txt and machine-readable resources
prompt: Check https://loisirs74.fr/llms.txt and use what it declares to list the machine-readable resources this site offers to agents, then fetch one of those resources and extract one true fact from it. Read-only task: never submit forms or make bookings.

judge.check: Followed a resource actually declared in llms.txt (e.g. a content/*.md file or the API index)
Extracted a fact that is true per the fetched resource
